diagrams.title: Singly Linked List Structure
diagrams.description: Shows how nodes are connected in a singly linked list with data and next pointer fields
diagrams.purpose: Understanding node structure and connectivity in SLL

diagrams.title: Doubly Linked List Structure
diagrams.description: Shows nodes with both forward and backward pointers
elements: Node with PREV, DATA, and NEXT fields
HEAD pointing to first, optional TAIL pointing to last

diagrams.title: Insertion at Beginning
diagrams.description: Step-by-step visualization of inserting new node at the start of linked list
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing constant time O(1) insertion operation

diagrams.title: Deletion at Beginning
diagrams.description: Shows how to remove the first node from linked list
diagrams.purpose: Understanding O(1) deletion operation and memory cleanup
